_note: News-derived seeds for SMR (NuScale Power) — real events, real-domain URLs — tracing the 2024 ADVANCE Act runup and its clean sell-the-news EXIT. Catalyst: the ADVANCE Act (Accelerating Deployment of Versatile, Advanced Nuclear for Clean Energy Act), a named bipartisan bill that streamlines NRC licensing/fees for advanced + small modular reactors, atop AI-datacenter power demand. NuScale (SMR) is the purest US SMR pure-play (first NRC-approved design). Trace: runup from ~Apr-2024 as the bill advances -> Senate passage Jun-18 -> PEAK ~Jul-12 as the President signs it Jul-9 -> buy-the-rumor/sell-the-news decline. ENTRY = the named-bill catalyst (discrete/datable, clears the gate); EXIT = the signing (the catalyst RESOLVES -> exit before the crash). Replaces the prior synthetic + mis-dated (2025) seed. Look-ahead caveat: curator training postdates these dates (hindsight upper bound, non-negotiable #4/#6). Non-blank url = news-derived.

articles.title: NuScale Power (SMR) rides the nuclear renaissance as the ADVANCE Act advances and AI data centers scramble for power
articles.snippet: NuScale Power (SMR), the only US small-modular-reactor developer with an NRC-approved design, is climbing as the ADVANCE Act - a bipartisan bill that streamlines NRC licensing and fees for advanced and small modular reactors - moves through Congress, while AI data centers scramble for clean baseload power. As the purest SMR pure-play, SMR is the most direct way to own the licensing overhaul, still under-owned ahead of the bill's passage and signing.

articles.title: The ADVANCE Act clears the Senate; the SMR-licensing overhaul heads to the President's desk
articles.snippet: The Senate passed the ADVANCE Act on June 18, sending the nuclear-licensing overhaul - which streamlines NRC review and fees for small modular reactors - to the President for signature. NuScale Power (SMR), the leading US SMR pure-play, extends its run as the discrete, datable legislative catalyst approaches its resolution at signing.

articles.title: President signs the ADVANCE Act into law; NuScale (SMR) tops out on the buy-the-rumor, sell-the-news
articles.snippet: The President signed the ADVANCE Act into law on July 9, enacting streamlined NRC licensing for small modular reactors. With the discrete legislative catalyst now RESOLVED, NuScale Power (SMR) - which had run up sharply into the signing - topped out around July 12 as the buy-the-rumor gave way to sell-the-news, and the stock began a steep decline. The driving catalyst is done.
